title: JumpEnchant
description: this uhh every time you jump a random item in your inventory gets enchanted
body:
this is a mod that will enchant your stuff with a random enchantment every time you jump
it even supports unsupported items!![enchants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65888fc4cc643e87a75eadc02f5bcf5bb0a65be4.png)

this will be a very fun addition to a singleplayer world AND this is a passion project so dont expect updates
